sections.paragraph: to descend, to let oneself down, e.g. from an ass, Jud 1:14 Jos 15:18 also used of inanimate things. Jud. 4:21 , “she struck the nail into his temples, וַתּצְנַח בָּאָרֶץ and it went down into the earth.” (Cogn. is جنح to bow down, see the concluding remark under the letter , p. 698, A .)
